summary: CI exposed a platform-dependent byte mismatch in the null-payload compiled prompt golden test.
The prompt compiler now normalizes final assembled prompt text to LF before UTF-8 encoding.
Frozen prompt assets and prompt hash manifest contents were not rewritten.
The null-payload golden metadata was updated for the normalized compiled prompt bytes.
validation: Targeted null-payload prompt compiler tests passed with 2 tests.
Prompt manifest hashes verified locally against prompts/prompt_hash_manifest.json.
